title: DecreasePositionRequest
description: DecreasePositionRequest schema from Uniswap Trading API

nftTokenId.description: The NFT token ID for V3/V4 positions. Not required for V2.

liquidityPercentageToDecrease.description: The percentage of liquidity to remove (1-100).

slippageTolerance.description: Slippage tolerance as a decimal (e.g., 0.5 for 0.5%).

deadline.description: Unix timestamp after which the transaction will revert.

simulateTransaction.description: If true, the response will include the gas fee.

withdrawAsWeth.description: If true, native tokens will be withdrawn as WETH instead of unwrapping to ETH.
